title: Origins 2 − 1
description: This is an Origins, Furniture and Food as well as other clientside mods for a more vanilla+ experience.
body:
# Origins 2 − 1


Welcome! This is a pack for a private server between friends but wanted to make a pack since the mod selection is available for anyone.

In this pack, we have Origins, Furniture and Food as well as other clientside mods for a more vanilla+ experience.

This can be a fun pack for both single-player and multiplayer if you wish!

He have Farmer's Delight for a fun experience for people who love to bake and cook different foods, Clutter and Handcrafted for some nice decor, and some other UI enhancing and Qol features.

---

Due to this modpack still being worked on expect bugs and updates to be frequent.

---

Links and credit to all non-Modrinth and some Modrinth mods and texture packs used:

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
